prompt: How have average professor ratings changed over academic years?

inputData.question: How have average professor ratings changed over academic years?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"How have average professor ratings changed over academic years?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"How have average professor ratings changed over academic years?"},"startedAt":1771855627391,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for how average professor ratings have changed over academic years. I need to:
1. Join course_evaluations (which has professor_rating) with enrollments (to get course_section_id)
2. Join with course_sections (which has academic_year and professor_id)
3. Group by academic_year and calculate the average professor_rating
4. Order by academic_year to show the trend over time

The key column is professor_rating from course_evaluations, and academic_year from course_sections. I'll aggregate by academic_year and compute the mean rating, ordering chronologically to show the trend.
","sql":"
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC
","assumptions":["Academic year is stored as a string in course_sections.academic_year","Professor ratings are numeric values in course_evaluations.professor_rating","Only evaluations linked to valid enrollments and course sections are included"]},"endedAt":1771855664575},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC

visualization.title: Average Professor Ratings Over Academic Years
visualization.description: Trend of average professor ratings across academic years

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC

visualization.title: Average Professor Ratings Over Academic Years
visualization.description: Trend of average professor ratings across academic years

result.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC
